description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a sleek black upper and contrasting white trim, laces, and sole. The shoe features a rounded toe, a white rubber outsole with a subtle tread, and a reinforced heel. Decorative white piping runs along the side and around the collar, adding a sporty accent. A stylized white logo is visible on the outer heel area, while the lacing system uses standard eyelets and white laces in a criss-cross pattern. The overall design is minimalistic and modern, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A black low-top sneaker with white trim, laces, and sole, featuring a sporty logo and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black upper, white piping, and a white logo on the heel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, white laces, and symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible white piping and no logo.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the heel structure and white trim around the collar.
attribute_logo: White stylized logo on the outer heel area, resembling interlocking letters.
